measurement_note: Size is N, the source length, with N copies of the required letter and k = repetition = N/2. The monotonic-stack reference is linear. A correct greedy implementation that scans every feasible next source index for each of the k output positions examines Theta(Nk) candidates, completes all tiers, and fails by quadratic scaling.
